channel.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Jul 13th, 2022
item.description:
Packages

Application layer

  • ros2_pytorch_cudastars0 - Extension of ros2_pytorchstars22 for CUDA devices with containerization.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Jun 13th, 2022
item.description:
Services

Cloud robotics

  • robolaunch

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 May 30th, 2022
item.description:
Packaging

  • ros2-snap - Create a snap for your ROS 2 application.

item.description:

Driver layer

  • odrive_ros2_controlstars119 - ODrive driver for ros2_control.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 May 26th, 2022
item.description:
Packages

Containerization

  • ros2-lxd - Install ROS 2 Humble in Ubuntu 20.04 or 18.04 using LXD containers.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 May 18th, 2022
item.description:
Packages

Driver layer

  • Universal Robotsstars149 - ROS2 drivers for UR CB3 and e-Series.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Mar 25th, 2022
item.description:
Packages

Containerization

  • osrf/docker_imagesstars345 - Dockerfiles of Official Library on Docker Hub and OSRF Organization on Docker Hub.
  • docker-ros2-desktop-vncstars178 - Dockerfiles to provide HTML5 VNC interface to access Ubuntu LXDE + ROS2.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Dec 13th, 2021
item.description:
Packages

Networking

  • Husarnet VPNstars155 - A P2P, secure network layer dedicated for ROS & ROS 2.

    • Packages

    Containerization

  • ros2-docker - Connecting ROS 2 nodes running in Docker containers over the internet.

    • Companies

  • Husarnet - Open Source, P2P, low-latency VPN dedicated for robots.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Oct 8th, 2021
item.description:
Operating systems

  • ReconROSstars12 - Framework for ROS2 FPGA-based hardware acceleration. Based on ReconOSstars26.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Sep 2nd, 2021
item.description:
Packages

"System" bindings

  • micro_ros_arduinostars223 - Integration of micro-ROS into Arduino software platform projects.
  • micro_ros_zephyr_modulestars23 - Integration of micro-ROS in Zeyphr OS based projects.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Aug 25th, 2021
item.description:
Packages

Ecosystem

  • ROS2 For Unitystars166 - An asset package which enables high-performance communication between Unity3D simulations and ROS2 ecosystem.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Aug 23rd, 2021
item.description:
Packages

Client libraries

  • ros2csstars39 - an alternative to ros2_dotnet, a ROS2 C# interface supporting full range of messages and modern ROS2.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Aug 10th, 2021
item.description:
Working Groups

  • Hardware Acceleration Working Group
    • Discourse threads tagged "wg-acceleration"

    Ecosystem

  • Foxglove Studiostars920 - Integrated visualization and diagnosis tool for robotics.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Aug 8th, 2021
item.description:
Documentation

  • ROS2 Quality Assurance Guidelinesstars6 - A collection of guidelines and tutorials for improving package quality, following REP-2004 quality standards and integrating Continuous Integration.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Jul 4th, 2021
item.description:
Packages

RMW (ROS middleware)

  • rmw_zenohstars20 - RMW implementation using Eclipse zenoh: Zero Overhead Pub/sub, Store/Query and Compute.
  • rmw_zenohstars20 - ROS2 RMW layer for zenoh.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Jul 2nd, 2021
item.description:
Courses

  • ROS2-Industrial training materialstars138

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Jun 25th, 2021
item.description:
Packages

RMW (ROS middleware)

  • rmw_iceoryxstars88 - Enables usage of the inter-process-communication middleware Eclipse iceoryx.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Jun 6th, 2021
item.description:
Packages

Application layer

  • easy_perception_deploymentstars47 - Package that accelerates training and deployment of Computer Vision models for industries.
  • easy_manipulation_deploymentstars41 - Package that integrates perception elements to establish an end-to-end pick and place task.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 May 10th, 2021
item.description:
Packages

Middleware

  • Eclipse Zenohstars528 - Zenoh is a scalable and extremely performant protocol that can be used transparently used to interact with ROS2 applications as well as for R2X communication. (https://img.shields.io/github/stars/eclipse-zenoh/zenoh)
  • Eclipse Zenoh-Plugin-DDSstars73 - This is a zenoh plugin that allows to transparently route ROS2/DDS data over zenoh. This is commonly used for R2X communication over Wireless network or across the Internet. (https://img.shields.io/github/stars/eclipse-zenoh/zenoh-plugin-dds)

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 May 8th, 2021
item.description:
Packages

Application layer

  • octomap_server2stars7 - ROS2 stack for mapping with OctoMap. Port of the ROS1 octomap_mappingstars222 package.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Apr 28th, 2021
item.description:
Packages

Application layer

  • navigationstars1.2k - ROS2 Navigation stack.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Mar 1st, 2021
item.description:
Packages

Application layer

  • darknet_ros - ROS2 wrapper for deploying Darknet's YOLO Computer Vision model.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Jan 23rd, 2021
item.description:
Packages

Interactivity

  • Jupyter ROS2stars15 - Jupyter widget helpers for ROS2.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Dec 16th, 2020
item.description:

Containerization

  • ros-tooling/cross_compilestars160 - Cross compile ROS and ROS 2 workspaces to non-native architectures and generate corresponding Docker images.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Nov 30th, 2020
item.description:
Operating systems

  • eMCOS - POSIX-compliant real-time OS for many-core processors expected to support AUTOSAR in the future.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Nov 25th, 2020
item.description:
Packages

Ecosystem

  • LGSVL - Simulation software to accelerate safe autonomous vehicle development.
  • Unity Robotics Hubstars1.3k - This is a central repository for tools, tutorials, resources, and documentation for robotic simulation in Unity.

    • Organizations

  • U.S. Department of Transportation

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Nov 24th, 2020
item.description:
Papers

  • Distributed and Synchronized Setup towards Real-Time Robotic Control using ROS2 on Linux
  • Real-Time Characteristics of ROS 2.0 in Multiagent Robot Systems: An Empirical Study
  • Response-Time Analysis of ROS 2 Processing Chains Under Reservation-Based Scheduling

item.description:
Companies

  • FARobot - Swarm Robot System, a ROS 2/DDS based Fleet Management System.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Nov 17th, 2020
item.description:

Driver layer

  • Blickfeld Cube 1 & Cube Range - ROS2 drivers for Blickfeld Cube 1 & Cube Range.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Oct 18th, 2020
item.description:
Forks

  • Apex.OS - Apex.OS is a fork of ROS 2 that has been made so robust and reliable that it can be used in safety-critical applications.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Oct 12th, 2020
item.description:
Packages

Application layer

  • Apex.Autonomy - Apex.Autonomy provides autonomy algorithms as individual building blocks and is compatible with Autoware.Auto.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Sep 25th, 2020
item.description:
Packages

"System" bindings

  • ROS2-Integration-Servicestars12 - ROS2 Integration and Routing which provides a complete tool to integrate other technologies with ROS2 easily and enable ROS2 on WAN/Internet.
  • sossstars50 - The System Of Systems Synthesizer is used to integrate ROS2 via ROS2-Integration-Service with other (communication) systems.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Aug 14th, 2020
item.description:
Courses

  • ROS2 Autoware Course
    • Autoware Course Lecture 1: Development Environment
    • Autoware Course Lecture 2: ROS2 101
    • Autoware Course Lecture 3: ROS 2 Tooling - Develop Like a Pro
    • Autoware Course Lecture 4: Platform HW, RTOS and DDS
    • Autoware Course Lecture 5: Autonomous Driving Stacks
    • Autoware Course Lecture 6: Autoware 101
    • Autoware Course Lecture 7: Object Perception: LIDAR
    • Autoware Course Lecture 8: Object Perception: CAMERA
    • Autoware Course Lecture 9: Object Perception: Radar
    • Autoware Course Lecture 10: State Estimation for Localization
    • Autoware Course Lecture 11: LGSVL Simulator
    • Autoware Course Lecture 12: Motion Control

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Aug 11th, 2020
item.description:
Operating systems

  • PYNQ - Python-based rapid prototyping of high performance ML applications running on XILINX FPGAs.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Aug 7th, 2020
item.description:
Companies

  • GESTALT ROBOTICS - Service provider for intelligent automation.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Aug 4th, 2020
item.description:
Companies

  • synapticon - ROS compatible motion control and drive products with efforts to support ROS2.
  • Ericsson Research - Connect ROS2 applications to 5G networks for M2M communication.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Jul 31st, 2020
item.description:
Packages

Ecosystem

  • Link ROS - Cloud Logging for ROS 1 and ROS 2.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Jul 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Packages

Application layer

  • ros2-ORB_SLAM2stars54 - ROS2 node wrapping the ORB_SLAM2 library.
  • basalt_ros2stars15 - ROS2 wrapper for Basalt VIO.
  • slam_gmappingstars50 - Slam Gmapping for ROS2.
  • slam_toolboxstars872 - Slam Toolbox for lifelong mapping and localization in potentially massive maps with ROS.
  • lidarslam_ros2stars186 - ROS2 package of 3D lidar slam using ndt/gicp registration and pose-optimization.
  • li_slam_ros2stars125 - ROS2 package of tightly-coupled lidar inertial ndt/gicp slam referenced from LIO-SAM.

    • Packages

    Driver layer

  • ros2_ouster_driversstars87 - ROS2 Drivers for the Ouster OS-1 Lidars.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Jul 15th, 2020
item.description:
Operating systems

  • Ubuntu Core - Build secure IoT devices with Ubuntu Core.
  • Ubuntu Server
  • Zephyr - Linux Foundation Projects RTOS aiming at beeing secure and safe.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Jul 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Companies

  • Roboception GmbH - Real-Time Perception for Your Robot.

item.description:

Ecosystem

  • Webots - Robot simulator for ROS 2.

item.description:

Client libraries

  • ros2_ruststars438 - Rust bindings for ROS2.

item.description:

item.description:
Working Groups

  • Technical Steering Committee
    • Discourse threads tagged "tsc"
  • Navigation Working Group
    • Discourse threads tagged "wg-navigation"
  • Security Working Group
    • Discourse threads tagged "wg-security"
    • ros-security/communitystars11 - Outlines the governance of the ROS 2 Security Working Group.
  • Safety Working Group
    • Safety Working Group Landing Page
    • Safety Design Pattern Catalogue

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Oct 6th, 2019
item.description:
Packages

Penetration testing

  • aztarnastars83 - A footprinting tool for robots.
  • ros2_fuzzerstars14 - ROS2 Topic & Service Fuzzer.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Sep 30th, 2019
item.description:
Companies

  • Rover Robotics - Rugged, industrial-grade robots.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Sep 24th, 2019
item.description:
Companies

  • Apex.AI - "Safe and certified software for autonomous mobility".
  • AutonomouStuff - "The world leader in autonomy systems and solutions".
  • MathWorks - ROS Toolbox.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Sep 18th, 2019
item.description:
Companies

  • Acutronic Robotics - Not existing anymore. Initiators of the Hardware Robot Information Model (HRIM), Hardware Robot Operating System (H-ROS) and creators of the world's first modular industrial robot arm MARA.
  • Eprosima - "The middleware experts".
  • Bosch - Robotics Team of Bosch Research.
  • Alias Robotics - Products and services in the context of robot cybersecurity.
  • Amazon - Robotics Team of Amazon Amazon Web Services (AWS).
  • ADLINK - "Leading EDGE COMPUTING".
  • Canonical - The company behind Ubuntu.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Sep 1st, 2019
item.description:
Packages

Application layer

  • vision_opencv - Packages for interfacing ROS2 with OpenCV.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Jul 12th, 2019
item.description:
Packages

Driver layer

  • ros2_xmlrpc_interfacestars0 - ros2 interface package with xmlrpc, to communicate with a Sesto server using Sesto API.
  • HRIMstars64 - A standard interface for robot modules.

    • Packages

    Containerization

  • micro-ROS/dockerstars31 - Docker-related material to setup, configure and develop with micro-ROS hardware.

    • Packages

    Application layer

  • apriltag_rosstars40 - ROS2 node for AprilTag detection.

    • Packages

    DDS communication mechanism implementations

  • Connext DDS - Connectivity Software for Developing and Integrating IIoT Systems. 💲

    • Operating systems

  • NuttXstars73 - NuttX fork of the official one for use with micro-ROS.

    • Services

    Robotics Capture the Flag (RCTF)

  • rctf-liststars27 - A list of Robotics CTF (RCTF) scenarios.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Jul 11th, 2019
item.description:
Documentation

  • ROS2 CLI cheats sheet - A cheats sheet for ROS 2 Command Line Interface.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Jun 30th, 2019
item.description:
Presentations

2019

  • Robot Modularity with Xilinx and H-ROS (Xilinx Inc.) Video

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Jun 25th, 2019
item.description:
Presentations

ROS-I EU Spring 2019 Workshop

  • Current Status of ROS 2 Hands-on Feature Overview Slides

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 May 11th, 2019
item.description:
Packages

Middleware

  • Micro XRCE-DDS Agent docker - Docker image containing the Micro XRCE-DDS Agent.
  • Micro XRCE-DDS Clientstars78 - Micro XRCE-DDS implements a client-server protocol to enable resource-constrained devices (clients) to take part in DDS communications.
  • Micro XRCE-DDS Agentstars54 - Micro XRCE-DDS Agent acts as a server between DDS Network and Micro XRCE-DDS Clients.
  • micro-ROS-Agentstars49 - ROS 2 package using Micro XRCE-DDS Agent.

    • Packages

    Driver layer

  • micro-ROS/hardware - Information and documentation about the hardware platforms used and supported in the micro-ROS project.

    • Packages

    Application layer

  • system-modesstars20 - System modes for ROS 2 and micro-ROS.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Apr 27th, 2019
item.description:
Packages

Driver layer

  • sick_scan2stars48 - ROS2 driver for the SICK TiM series of laser scanners (TiM551/TiM561/TiM571).
  • ros2_denso_radarstars6 - Toyota/Lexus 2015-2017 Denso Radar driver for ROS2.
  • zed-ros2-wrapperstars61 - ROS 2 wrapper beta for the ZED SDK.
  • Autoware.IO - Autoware.IO provides a heterogeneous hardware reference platform and enables the integration of member company's solutions onto platforms which support the Autoware.Auto and Autoware.AI software stack.

    • Packages

    Application layer

  • Autoware.Auto - Autoware.Auto provides an open-source software stack based on ROS 2 for self-driving technology.

    • Courses

  • ROS 2 Basics in 5 Days (C++) - Learn how to start working with ROS 2 (The Construct)

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Apr 10th, 2019
item.description:
Packages

Application layer

  • ros2_pytorchstars22 - ROS2 nodes for computer vision tasks in PyTorch .

    • Packages

    Driver layer

  • ros2_track_imustars2 - ROS2 node for TrackIMU IMU sensor.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Mar 2nd, 2019
item.description:
Packages

Demonstrations

  • adlink_ddsbotstars36 - The ROS 2.0/1.0 based robots swarm architecture (opensplice DDS).
  • adlink_neuronbotstars10 - ROS2/DDS robot pkg for human following and swarm.
  • turtlebot3 - ROS2 based TurtleBot3 demo including Bringup, Teleop and Cartographer.

    • Packages

    Examples

  • turtlebot2_demostars81 - TurtleBot 2 demos using ROS 2.
  • examples/rclcpp - C++ examples.
  • examples/rclpy - Python examples.
  • rcljava_examples - Package containing examples of how to use the rcljava API.
  • ros2_talker_android, ros2_listener_androidstars21 - Example Android apps for the ROS2 Java bindings.

    • Packages

    Benchmarking

  • ros2_benchmarkingstars38 - Framework for ROS2 benchmarking. ROS2 communication characteristics can be evaluated on several axes, quickly and in an automated way.
  • performance_teststars60 - Test performance and latency of various communication means like ROS 2, FastRTPS and Connext DDS Micro.

    • Packages

    Containerization

  • docker-ros2-ospl-cestars8 - A dockerfile to build a ROS2 + OpenSplice CE container.
  • ros2_java_dockerstars4 - Dockerfiles for building ros2_java with OpenJDK and Android.

    • Packages

    Ecosystem

  • rosbag2stars149 - ROS2 native rosbag.
  • rvizstars140 - 3D Robot Visualizer.
  • urdfdomstars0 - URDF (U-Robot Description Format) library which provides core data structures and a simple XML parser
  • urdfdom_headersstars0 - Headers for URDF parsers.
  • ros2clistars104 - ROS 2 command line tools.
  • orocos_kinematics_dynamicsstars7 - Orocos Kinematics and Dynamics C++ library.
  • pyddsstars21 - Simple DDS Python API for Vortex Lite and for OpenSplice.

    • Packages

    Application layer

  • ros2_controlstars201 - ros2_control is a proof of concept on how new features within ROS 2 can be elaborated and used in the context of robot control (ros2_controllers).
  • ros2_controllersstars132 - Description of ros_controllers.
  • geometry2stars54 - A set of ROS packages for keeping track of coordinate transforms.
  • cartographerstars31 - Real-time simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) in 2D and 3D across multiple platforms and sensor configurations.
  • teleop_twist_keyboardstars15 - Generic Keyboard Teleop for ROS2.
  • teleop_twist_joystars15 - Simple joystick teleop for twist robots.
  • diagnostics - Forked version of the original ROS1 Diagnostics for ROS 2 (currently diagnostics_updater only).
  • robot_state_publisher - Forked version of the original ROS Robot State Publisher with all modifications to compile within a ROS2 Ecosystem.
  • common_interfacesstars105 - A set of packages which contain common interface files (.msg and .srv).
  • ros2_object_mapstars11 - "Mark tag of objects on map when SLAM".
  • ros2_object_analyticsstars85 - Object Analytics (OA) is ROS2 wrapper for realtime object detection, localization and tracking.
  • ros2_intel_movidius_ncsstars26 - ROS2 wrapper for Movidius™ Neural Compute Stick (NCS) Neuronal Compute API.
  • ros2_moving_objectstars4 - Addressing moving objects based on messages generated by Object Analytics ros2_object_analytics.
  • ros2_openvino_toolkitstars121 - ROS2 wrapper for CV API of OpenVINO™ (human vision emulation).
  • ros2_grasp_librarystars127 - Probably a grasp library :).
  • ros2-web-bridgestars172 - Bridging your browser to the ROS 2.0.
  • ros2_message_filtersstars20 - ros2_message_filters blends various messages based on the conditions that filter needs to met and derives from ROS2 porting of ROS message_filters.
  • ros2-tensorflowstars41 - ROS2 nodes for computer vision tasks in Tensorflow.
  • pidstars7 - A PID controller for ROS2.

    • Packages

    "System" bindings

  • rclandroid - Android API for ROS2.
  • rclnodejsstars214 - Node.js version of ROS2.0 client.
  • riot-ros2stars23 - This project enables ROS2 to run on microcontrollers using the RIOT Operating System.

    • Packages

    Driver layer

  • cozmo_driver_ros2stars3 - Unofficial Anki Cozmo node for ROS2.
  • sphero_ros2stars1 - ROS2 sphero driver.
  • flock2stars46 - ROS2 driver for DJI Tello drones.
  • ros2_raspicam_nodestars8 - ROS2 node for Raspberry Pi camera.
  • joystick_driversstars5 - ROS2 drivers for joysticks.
  • joystick_drivers_from_scratchstars0 - Joystick driver packages for ROS 2.
  • joystick_ros2stars15 - Joystick driver for ROS2, support all platforms: Linux, macOS, Windows.
  • ros2_teleop_keyboardstars3 - Teleop Twist Keyboard for ROS2.
  • ros_astra_camerastars8 - ROS2 wrapper for Astra camera.
  • ros2_usb_camerastars39 - ROS2 General USB camera driver.
  • ros2_android_driversstars2 - Collection of ROS2 drivers for several Android sensors.
  • ros2_intel_realsensestars123 - ROS2 Wrapper for Intel® RealSense™ Devices.
  • raspicam2_nodestars33 - ROS2 node for camera module of Raspberry Pi.
  • FIROS2stars9 - ROS2 integrable tool focused in the intercommunication between ROS2 and FIWARE.
  • lino2_upperstars0 - Linorobot on ROS2.
  • RysROS2stars4 - ROS2 software stack for MiniRys robots.
  • px4_to_rosstars23 - ROS2/ROS packages for communicate PX4 with ROS.
  • multiwii_ros2stars7 - ROS2 Node for MultiWii and Cleanflight flight controllers.
  • ydlidar_ros2stars1 - ROS2 wrapper for ydlidar.

    • Packages

    Client libraries

  • rcladastars6 - ROS Client Library for Ada.
  • rclcppstars308 - ROS Client Library for C++.
  • rclgostars47 - ROS Client Library for Go.
  • rclpystars137 - ROS Client Library for Python.
  • rcljava - ROS Client Library for Java.
  • rclnodejsstars214 - ROS Client Library for Node.js.
  • rclobjcstars18 - ROS Client Library for Objective C (for iOS).
  • rclcstars59 - ROS Client Library for C.
  • ros2_dotnetstars91 - .NET bindings for ROS2.

    • Packages

    Client libraries common

  • rclstars84 - Library to support implementation of language specific ROS Client Libraries.
  • system_testsstars25 - Tests for rclcpp and rclpy.
  • rcl_interfacesstars22 - A repository for messages and services used by the ROS client libraries.

    • Packages

    IDL generators

  • rosidl_generator_java - Generate the ROS interfaces in Java.
  • rosidl_generator_objc - Generate the ROS interfaces in Objective C.
  • rosidl_generator_cpp - Generate the ROS interfaces in C++.
  • rosidl_generator_c - Generate the ROS interfaces in C.
  • rosidlstars45 - Packages which provide the ROS IDL (.msg) definition and code generation.
  • rosidl_ddsstars4 - Generate the DDS interfaces for ROS interfaces.

    • Packages

    RMW (ROS middleware)

  • rmw - Contains the ROS middleware API.
  • rmw_connext_cpp - Implement the ROS middleware interface using RTI Connext static code generation in C++.
  • rmw_fastrtps_cpp - Implement the ROS middleware interface using eProsima FastRTPS static code generation in C++.
  • rmw_dpsstars22 - Implementation of the ROS Middleware (rmw) Interface using Intel's Distributed Publish & Subscribe.
  • rmw_opensplice_cpp - Implement the ROS middleware interface using PrismTech OpenSplice static code generation in C++.
  • rmw_coredxstars0 - CoreDX DDS integration layer for ROS2.
  • rmw_freertpsstars1 - RMW implementation using freertps.
  • rcutilsstars40 - Common C functions and data structures used in ROS 2.
  • freertpsstars86 - a free, portable, minimalist, work-in-progress RTPS implementation.
  • rmw_cycloneddsstars74 - ROS2 RMW layer for Eclipse Cyclone DDS.

    • Packages

    DDS communication mechanism implementations

  • Fast-RTPSstars1.3k - Implementation of RTPS Standard (RTPS is the wire interoperability protocol for DDS).
  • OpenSplicestars229 - Implementation of the OMG DDS Standard. 💲
  • CoreDX DDS - Implementation of Twin Oaks Computing, Inc.. 💲
  • freertpsstars86 - A free, portable, minimalist, work-in-progress RTPS implementation.
  • cddsstars7 - Cyclone DDS is developed completely in the open and is undergoing the acceptance process to become part of Eclipse IoT.
  • Micro-XRCE-DDS)stars98 - An XRCE DDS implementation (supported by microROS).

    • Packages

    Build system (Linux)

  • meta-ros2stars16 - ROS 2 Layer for OpenEmbedded Linux.

    • Packages

    Build system (ROS2)

  • cistars37 - ROS 2 CI Infrastructure.
  • ament_cmake_export_jars - The ability to export Java archives to downstream packages in the ament buildsystem in CMake.
  • rmw_implementation_cmake - CMake functions which can discover and enumerate available implementations.
  • rmw_implementationstars17 - CMake infrastructure and dependencies for rmw implementations.

    • Papers

  • Towards an open standard for assessing the severity of robot security vulnerabilities, The Robot Vulnerability Scoring System (RVSS)
  • Introducting the Robot Security Framework (RSF), A standardized methodology to perform security assessments in robotics

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Oct 28th, 2018
item.description:
Documentation

  • ROS Index - Future single entry point into ROS2 documentation (BETA).
    • Foxy packages.
    • Dashing packages.
    • Crystal packages.
    • Bouncy packages.

item.title: fkromer/awesome-ros2 Oct 7th, 2017
item.description:
Documentation

  • ROS 2 Design - Articles which inform and guide the ROS 2.0 design efforts.
  • ROS 2 Docs (Overview) - Details about ROS 2 internal design and organisation.
  • ROS 2 Wiki - Entry point to find all kind of information about ROS 2.
